\tzpentry{ID3447}{Number Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3447 introduces Number Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\dot\\varphi_i = \\omega_i + \\frac{1}{N}\\sum_j K_{ij}\\sin(\\varphi_j-\\varphi_i) + \\eta_i(t).$$
